
Tribe/Squad/Team: Estate Management / ICE Cowboys

Role being undertaken: Developer supporting SPESTG-1054 UAT deployment validation.

Reason for access: Reader access is required to view the t3_d365connect_uat Azure subscription and validate UAT resources created by the deployment pipelines. This access is needed to confirm resource creation, deployment status, and support troubleshooting during UAT pipeline execution. Read-only access only; no deployment or delete permission required.
